column2: 回滚只会恢复之前受控恢复记录的恢复前备份；执行前会再创建新的安全备份并验证目标连接。

column1: I understand rollback is destructive and will restore the recorded pre-restore backup.
column2: 我理解回滚是破坏性操作，并会恢复已记录的恢复前备份。

column1: I understand PostgreSQL rollback will reset the public schema before replaying the backup.
column2: 我理解 PostgreSQL 回滚会在回放备份前重置 public schema。

column1: Rollback Guard
column2: 回滚防护

column1: Run Restore Rollback
column2: 执行恢复回滚

column1: Rollback never accepts arbitrary paths; WLS checks the audit record, artifact metadata, checksum, driver, and database before executing.
column2: 回滚不接受任意路径；执行前 WLS 会校验审计记录、产物元数据、校验和、驱动和数据库。

column1: Database Restore Preflight Boundary
column2: 数据库恢复预检边界

column1: Preflight verifies the selected backup artifact, metadata, checksum, driver, database, and readability; it never restores data or runs SQL.
column2: 预检会验证所选备份产物、元数据、校验和、驱动、数据库和可读性；不会恢复数据或运行 SQL。

column1: I understand WLS Database Manager will only verify the selected backup artifact and will not restore data.
column2: 我确认 WLS Database Manager 只会验证所选备份产物，不会恢复数据。

column1: Preflight Guard
column2: 预检保护

column1: Run Restore Preflight
column2: 运行恢复预检

column1: Use this preflight before restore execution; it never modifies the target database.
column2: 在恢复执行前使用此预检；它不会修改目标数据库。

column1: Database Restore Execution Boundary
column2: 数据库恢复执行边界

column1: Execution re-runs restore preflight, creates a fresh pre-restore backup, restores through the selected driver adapter, verifies the target connection, and writes sanitized audit records.
column2: 执行会重新运行恢复预检，创建新的恢复前备份，通过所选驱动适配器恢复，验证目标连接，并写入脱敏审计记录。

column1: Preflight Phrase
column2: 预检确认短语

column1: Restore Phrase
column2: 恢复短语

column1: I understand WLS Database Manager will verify the artifact again before restore execution.
column2: 我确认 WLS Database Manager 会在恢复执行前再次验证产物。

column1: I understand this restore is destructive and a fresh pre-restore backup will be created first.
column2: 我确认本次恢复具有破坏性，并会先创建新的恢复前备份。

column1: I understand PostgreSQL plain SQL restore will reset the public schema before replaying the artifact.
column2: 我确认 PostgreSQL plain SQL 恢复会在回放产物前重置 public schema。

column1: Reset Mode
column2: Reset 模式

column1: Restore Guard
column2: 恢复保护

column1: Run Database Restore
column2: 运行数据库恢复

column1: Restore execution supports MySQL/MariaDB .sql and .sql.gz artifacts, PostgreSQL .dump and .backup artifacts, and PostgreSQL plain SQL artifacts only behind RESET_PG_SCHEMA public-schema reset. Migration import and WLS reload are separate guarded paths; project health probes are read-only.
column2: 恢复执行支持 MySQL/MariaDB .sql 和 .sql.gz 产物、PostgreSQL .dump 和 .backup 产物，以及需要 RESET_PG_SCHEMA public schema reset 保护的 PostgreSQL plain SQL 产物。迁移导入和 WLS 重载是独立受控路径；项目健康探针是只读的。

column1: Database Migration Preflight Boundary
column2: 数据库迁移预检边界

column1: Preflight verifies the migration target, enabled Project Profile, backup evidence, metadata, checksum, and risk classification; it never runs migrations or SQL.
column2: 预检会验证迁移目标、已启用 Project Profile、备份证据、元数据、校验和和风险分类；不会运行迁移或 SQL。

column1: I understand WLS Database Manager will only verify migration readiness and will not run migration scripts.
column2: 我确认 WLS Database Manager 只会验证迁移准备状态，不会运行迁移脚本。

column1: Migration Preflight Guard
column2: 迁移预检保护

column1: Run Migration Preflight
column2: 运行迁移预检

column1: Preflight is read-only. MySQL/MariaDB migration import is offered in a separate card and requires RUN_DB_MIGRATION before any database change can happen.
column2: 预检是只读的。MySQL/MariaDB 迁移导入在独立卡片中提供，任何数据库变更前都必须确认 RUN_DB_MIGRATION。

column1: Database Migration Execution Boundary
column2: 数据库迁移执行边界

column1: Execution re-runs migration preflight, creates a fresh pre-migration backup, imports the verified MySQL/MariaDB .sql artifact, verifies the target, and writes sanitized audit records.
column2: 执行会重新运行迁移预检，创建新的迁移前备份，导入已验证的 MySQL/MariaDB .sql 产物，验证目标并写入脱敏审计记录。

column1: Migration Phrase
column2: 迁移确认短语

column1: I understand WLS Database Manager will verify the artifact again before migration import.
column2: 我理解 WLS Database Manager 会在迁移导入前再次验证产物。

column1: I understand migration import modifies the target database after creating a fresh pre-migration backup.
column2: 我理解迁移导入会在创建新的迁移前备份后修改目标数据库。

column1: Migration Import Guard
column2: 迁移导入防护

column1: Run Migration Import
column2: 执行迁移导入

column1: This slice does not run project code migrations, schema diff generators, WLS reload, or arbitrary SQL; it imports only a verified .sql or .sql.gz backup artifact from the WLS backup directory.
column2: 此切片不会运行项目代码迁移、schema diff 生成器、WLS 重载或任意 SQL；它只从 WLS 备份目录导入已验证的 .sql 或 .sql.gz 备份产物。

column1: Database SQL Apply Boundary
column2: 数据库 SQL 应用边界

column1: Execution resolves a reviewed .sql artifact from the WLS backup directory, creates a fresh pre-apply backup, blocks destructive or data-touching SQL, runs additive DDL only, verifies the target, and appends audit evidence.
column2: 执行会从 WLS 备份目录解析已审核的 .sql 产物，创建新的应用前备份，阻断破坏性或数据修改 SQL，仅运行增量 DDL，验证目标并追加审计证据。

column1: SQL Apply Phrase
column2: SQL 应用确认短语

column1: I understand SQL apply will modify the target database after creating a fresh pre-apply backup.
column2: 我理解 SQL 应用会在创建新的应用前备份后修改目标数据库。

column1: SQL Allowlist
column2: SQL 白名单

column1: Allowed: CREATE TABLE, CREATE INDEX, ALTER TABLE ADD. Blocked: DROP, TRUNCATE, DELETE, UPDATE, GRANT, REVOKE, LOAD, COPY, and database-level SQL.
column2: 允许：CREATE TABLE、CREATE INDEX、ALTER TABLE ADD。阻断：DROP、TRUNCATE、DELETE、UPDATE、GRANT、REVOKE、LOAD、COPY 和数据库级 SQL。

column1: SQL Apply Guard
column2: SQL 应用防护

column1: Run SQL Apply

column2: PostgreSQL plain SQL 恢复需要 RESET_PG_SCHEMA，并且只会重置 public schema；存在额外用户 schema 时会阻止执行。

column1: Migration dry-run requires a target profile, branch, tag, or migration reference.

column1: Migration preflight requires a verified backup artifact before it can run.

column2: SQL 应用产物必须是以 .sql 或 .sql.gz 结尾的安全文件名。

column1: SQL apply executes only additive allowlisted DDL and creates a fresh pre-apply schema/data backup before execution.
column2: SQL 应用只执行白名单内的增量 DDL，执行前会创建新的结构和数据备份。

column1: Generated backup artifact name is not safe; adjust the database name or artifact label.
column2: 生成的备份产物名称不安全；请调整数据库名称或产物标签。

column2: 执行只能把备份产物写入 var/backups/wls/db-manager/database。

column1: Not required for this plan.
column2: 当前计划不需要。

column1: Used as the future target profile, branch, tag, or migration reference.
column2: 作为未来目标 profile、分支、标签或迁移引用使用。

column1: Not required for backup or restore planning.
column2: 备份或恢复计划不需要。

column1: Choose a database backup, restore, or migration dry-run action before future execution adapters are allowed to run.
column2: 先选择数据库备份、恢复或迁移 dry-run 动作，未来执行适配器才允许进入执行阶段。

column1: Verify driver support, database identifier safety, credential state, artifact name, and backup directory confinement.
column2: 验证驱动支持、数据库标识符安全性、凭据状态、产物名称和备份目录边界。

column1: %{1} adapter builds a vendor dump command inside the adapter boundary and writes only to the WLS backup directory.
column2: %{1} 适配器在适配器边界内生成数据库厂商 dump 命令，并且只写入 WLS 备份目录。

column1: Record artifact metadata, checksum, profile scope, operator intent, and backup result in the DbManager audit log.
column2: 在 DbManager 审计日志中记录产物元数据、校验和、Profile 范围、操作员意图和备份结果。

column1: Keep restore, migration, SQL apply, and WLS reload side effects disabled from the backup execution path.
column2: 备份执行路径保持禁用恢复、迁移、SQL 应用和 WLS 重载副作用。

column1: Run restore preflight to verify artifact metadata, checksum, driver, database, and readability before destructive restore is allowed.
column2: 允许破坏性恢复前，先运行恢复预检以验证产物元数据、校验和、驱动、数据库和可读性。

column1: Create a fresh pre-restore backup before destructive restore execution runs.
column2: 执行破坏性恢复前创建新的恢复前备份。

column1: Require CHECK_DB_RESTORE, RUN_DB_RESTORE, and adapter-specific reset confirmation when schema reset is required.
column2: 需要 schema reset 时，必须确认 CHECK_DB_RESTORE、RUN_DB_RESTORE 和适配器专属 reset 短语。

column1: %{1} adapter restores through an allowlisted command path and then runs verification queries.
column2: %{1} 适配器通过白名单命令路径执行恢复，然后运行验证查询。

column1: WLS reload remains disabled; project health is reported separately as a read-only summary.
column2: WLS 重载仍保持禁用；项目健康以独立的只读摘要展示。

column1: Resolve the reviewed SQL artifact by server-side name lookup inside the WLS backup directory.
column2: 通过服务端名称查找在 WLS 备份目录内解析已审核的 SQL 产物。

column1: Reject oversized artifacts and block destructive or data-touching SQL before any adapter connects.
column2: 任何适配器连接前先拒绝超大产物并阻断破坏性或数据修改 SQL。

column1: Create a fresh schema and data pre-apply backup through the existing dump adapter.
column2: 通过现有 dump 适配器创建新的结构和数据应用前备份。

column1: Execute only additive CREATE TABLE, CREATE INDEX, or ALTER TABLE ADD statements through the selected PDO driver.
column2: 仅通过所选 PDO 驱动执行增量 CREATE TABLE、CREATE INDEX 或 ALTER TABLE ADD 语句。

column1: Run a verification query, append sanitized audit evidence, and keep WLS reload separate from SQL apply execution.
column2: 运行验证查询，追加脱敏审计证据，并将 WLS 重载与 SQL 应用执行分离。

column1: Use the recorded pre-apply backup as the rollback source if the additive SQL must be reversed.
column2: 如果需要撤销增量 SQL，使用记录的应用前备份作为回滚来源。

column1: Resolve the migration target and selected MySQL/MariaDB backup artifact by server-side name lookup inside the WLS backup directory.
column2: 通过服务端名称查找在 WLS 备份目录内解析迁移目标和所选 MySQL/MariaDB 备份产物。

column1: Run migration preflight to verify metadata, byte size, checksum, driver, database, and risk classification before execution is offered.
column2: 提供执行入口前先运行迁移预检，校验元数据、字节大小、校验和、驱动、数据库和风险分类。

column1: Require CHECK_DB_MIGRATION and RUN_DB_MIGRATION confirmations before importing the artifact.
column2: 导入产物前必须确认 CHECK_DB_MIGRATION 和 RUN_DB_MIGRATION。

column1: Create a fresh schema and data pre-migration backup through the existing dump adapter.
column2: 通过现有 dump 适配器创建新的结构和数据迁移前备份。

column1: Import the verified .sql or .sql.gz artifact through the MySQL client with credentials passed through process environment only.
column2: 通过 MySQL 客户端导入已验证的 .sql 或 .sql.gz 产物，凭据只通过进程环境传递。

column1: Run a verification query, append sanitized audit evidence, and keep WLS reload separate from migration execution.
column2: 运行验证查询，追加脱敏审计证据，并将 WLS 重载与迁移执行分离。

column1: Resolve source and target profiles without executing project migration scripts.
column2: 解析源和目标 Profile，但不执行项目迁移脚本。

column1: Verify backup artifact metadata, byte size, checksum, driver, and database before any migration execution path can exist.
column2: 任何迁移执行路径出现前，都必须先验证备份产物元数据、字节大小、校验和、驱动和数据库。

column1: Build a schema/data drift report using adapter-owned inspection commands or safe framework metadata.
column2: 使用适配器自有检查命令或安全框架元数据生成结构/数据漂移报告。

column1: Classify generated migration intent as additive, destructive, data-touching, or unsupported before any apply button exists.
column2: 在出现任何应用按钮前，先把迁移意图归类为追加、破坏性、触碰数据或不支持。

column1: Require backup evidence, confirmation phrase, audit record, and rollback guidance before a later migration execution slice can run.
column2: 后续迁移执行切片运行前，需要备份证据、确认短语、审计记录和回滚指引。

column1: Keep this dry-run path free of DDL, DML, dump writes, restore writes, and WLS reload side effects.
column2: 保持该 dry-run 路径不产生 DDL、DML、dump 写入、恢复写入和 WLS 重载副作用。

column1: The enabled Project Profile is the preferred source for project-scoped operations.

column1: Migration preflight is available after CHECK_DB_MIGRATION confirmation; migration execution remains disabled for this driver.
